data.revised_prompt: photorealistic cinematic Japanese drama film still, environmental storytelling, professional book-summary video visual, warm natural light, quiet emotional realism, realistic lived-in details, 35mm lens, 16:9, no readable text. Scene 01/8, Opening the letter shop. Primary instruction: wide exterior morning shot of a narrow Kamakura side street; a tiny stationery shop door is half open; shelves of envelopes visible inside; red camellia pot near the threshold; the woman is small in frame, turning the key, not looking at camera. Visible character rule: one East Asian woman, early 30s, short black bob haircut, cream cardigan, white top, dark skirt; exactly one visible person, never a close-up portrait, never looking directly at camera. Emotional theme: story opens quietly, the letter shop becomes a doorway into memory. Blank paper only, no readable words.
